LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.0.descripti: We lack a place to help people and should have a dedicated hospital.
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.0.label: need hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.1.descripti: We have a hospital, but it is incredibly dirty. We are not animals!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.1.label: dirty hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.2.label: small hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.3.descripti: We have a very spacious hospital.
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.3.label: spacious hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.4.descripti: We have a huge, professional hospital!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.4.label: huge hospital
